<!-- indicator: fig-uc-impact-mhsu -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-uc-impact-mhsu
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Mental Wellbeing & Substance Use in Ulster County (n = 67)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of Mental Wellbeing & Substance Use in Ulster County (n = 67).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-uc-impact-mhsu", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
